items.title: England legend John Barnes recreates famous World Cup rap — to get more England fans in the pub
items.summary: JOHN Barnes has recreated his famous World Cup rap — to get more England fans to the pub.  The Three Lions hero, 62, famously featured on New Order’s Italia ‘90 anthem World in Motion. And the former Liverpool winger has returned to music in a bid to get supporters into bars this summer.

items.title: ‘Hard to put into words’ – Arsenal wonderkid leaves after 10 years and shares emotional statement upon joining new club
items.summary: ARSENAL youngster Josh Nichols said he will "always" be a Gunner in an emotional farewell message to his boyhood club. items.title: Barca & Real Madrid eye Cucurella - Tuesday's gossip
items.summary: Chelsea's Marc Cucurella linked with a return to Spain, Liverpool keen on teenage RB Leipzig forward Yan Diomande, and Newcastle face competition for Atalanta right-back Marco Palestra, plus more.

items.title: Plymouth ‘remain committed’ despite releasing women’s squad via email
items.summary: Club slashed team budget despite near-promotion Head coach quit after decision players called ‘cold’ Plymouth Argyle have said they “did not take lightly” their decision to significantly reduce their women’s team’s budget and tell the squad via email that their contracts were not being renewed. items.title: Glamorous DAZN presenter lands dream World Cup role despite her country failing to qualify AGAIN
items.summary: ITALY will be represented at the 2026 World Cup after all. Not by their footballers - who failed to qualify for the THIRD tournament on the trot - but by glamorous presenter Eleanora Incardona.
